headline: Ibexis Announces Expanded Bank Relationships and New Index Options for FIA Plus® and WealthDefender® Series
summary: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., July 06, 2026--Ibexis Life & Annuity Insurance Company® is pleased to announce expanded bank relationships and the addition of two innovative index options to its FIA Plus® and WealthDefender® product series, further enhancing the growth opportunities and diversification available to financial professionals and their clients through fixed indexed annuities.
